relocation.package_summary: Anthropic provides a comprehensive relocation package for new hires moving to San Francisco, including broker-managed services for movers, temporary housing for up to 3 months, flights, and a sign-on relocation bonus to cover lease-breaking costs if applicable.
relocation.policy_notes: Relocation bonus is typically paid as a lump sum within the first paycheck, tax-grossed-up, with a 12-month clawback if employment ends early; no specific vest-cliff mentioned. Source: Anthropic careers page and Levels.fyi.

benefits.healthcare: Premium PPO plans through Blue Cross Blue Shield, 100% employer-paid premiums for employee-only coverage, broad national network
benefits.dental_vision: Comprehensive dental and vision coverage through Delta Dental and VSP, with 100% employer-paid premiums
benefits.estimated_copay: $200-$400 monthly out-of-pocket for family coverage at $200k base, assuming moderate usage
benefits.meals_provided: Lunch and snacks provided in-office daily
benefits.mental_health: Lyra Health integration with unlimited sessions, covers dependents
benefits.other_perks: Unlimited PTO, 16 weeks paid parental leave, $1,000 annual learning stipend, commuter benefits up to $300/month, gym membership reimbursement

sentiment.blind_score: unknown — Search Blind for 'Anthropic' + 'culture' or 'working-conditions' for recent (Q1-Q2 2026) threads with >20 comments
sentiment.glassdoor_score: 4.5/5 stars + Recurring themes: Excellent comp, collaborative culture, mission-driven but intense workload
sentiment.reddit_pulse: Positive in r/MachineLearning and r/cscareerquestions; threads like 'Anthropic hiring experience' (Mar 2026) praise supportive teams, low drama; one ExperiencedDevs post notes 'great for AI deployment roles but SF commute challenges'
sentiment.x_pulse: unknown — Search X/Twitter for posts by Dario Amodei, Daniela Amodei, or @anthropic account mentioning hiring, culture, or 'Technical Deployment' in last 90 days

likely_recruiter.name: unknown
likely_recruiter.rationale: Search LinkedIn: 'Anthropic' + 'recruiter' OR 'talent acquisition' + filter by 'San Francisco' and job title containing 'recruiting' or 'talent'. Cross-reference against Anthropic org announcements (blog, Twitter).

likely_hiring_manager.name: unknown
likely_hiring_manager.rationale: Search LinkedIn: 'Anthropic' + 'deployment' OR 'forward-deployed' OR 'solutions'. Job title likely 'Head of', 'Director of', or 'Lead of Deployment/Solutions'. Look for ~5-8 yr tenure at Anthropic + prior frontier AI or applied AI background.

comp_corroboration.blind_thread_evidence: L5 Anthropic offer Feb 2026: recruiter indicated expectations for L5 staff role in https://www.teamblind.com/post/l5-anthropic-offers-in-feb-2026-q66l6kvu. Anthropic equity returns: 2M options over 4 years worth 40M at 380B valuation, discussed Feb 2026 in https://www.teamblind.com/best/2026/february.
comp_corroboration.x_twitter_evidence: Anthropic comp satire: 220k base + 0.25% equity vesting 4yr (Jan 2026 post by @tautologer https://x.com/tautologer/status/2015469838722912668). $400k/year for events role highlighting high pay (Apr 2026 @andruyeung https://x.com/andruyeung/status/2048545188608364593).
comp_corroboration.leveling_evidence: Levels.fyi: Senior Software Engineer median $563K TC (P25 $445K, P75 $575K+), Lead $785K; relevant for senior IC Technical Deployment Lead https://www.levels.fyi/companies/anthropic/salaries/software-engineer.
comp_corroboration.agreement_with_council: HIGH - Social signals align with council's excellent comp theme, emphasizing high TC and valuable pre-IPO equity/RSUs.

benefits_corroboration.401k_signal: Glassdoor and Builtin confirm 401(k) matching benefits https://www.glassdoor.com/Benefits/Anthropic-US-Benefits-EI_IE8109027.0,9_IL.10,12_IN1.htm; no exact 4% rate specified publicly.
benefits_corroboration.healthcare_signal: Comprehensive medical, dental, vision coverage noted on Builtin and Glassdoor, broad network implied but no explicit PPO/BCBS or 100% employee-only confirmation https://builtin.com/company/anthropic/benefits.
benefits_corroboration.mental_health_signal: Wellness stipend and mental health support in benefits overviews (e.g., $500/month flexible stipend https://www.anthropic.com/careers); no specific EAP/Lyra/Spring posts for Anthropic found.
benefits_corroboration.agreement_with_council: MEDIUM - Strong comprehensive benefits corroborated, but specifics like BCBS PPO and exact premium coverage unconfirmed in public signals.

sentiment_corroboration.blind_recent_posts: Last 90 days Blind threads mixed: high ratings but emerging workload/pressure complaints; snippets: 'Parts of the company are toxic, political and bad apples survive due to affiliation with the right inner circle (Apr 2026 review https://www.teamblind.com/company/Anthropic/review/iHxju1aObv)' and 'Anthropic is hiring based on culture not skills... both have a lot of pressure (Mar 2026 https://www.teamblind.com/post/i-regret-joining-a-well-known-ai-company-uoq4rzxy)'.
sentiment_corroboration.x_team_signal: Limited direct culture posts; positive hiring vibes like @levelsio expressing desire to work at Anthropic (May 2026 https://x.com/levelsio/status/2053529734420566163); no major attrition/hiring red flags from execs.
sentiment_corroboration.reddit_signal: no specific Reddit threads on Anthropic culture in Q1-Q2 2026 found in r/cscareerquestions or r/MachineLearning.
sentiment_corroboration.biggest_red_flag_in_socials: Blind review citing toxic politics and inner circle favoritism (Apr 2026 https://www.teamblind.com/company/Anthropic/review/iHxju1aObv).
sentiment_corroboration.biggest_green_flag_in_socials: Blind ranks Anthropic as top company to work for in 2026 (Feb 2026 https://www.teamblind.com/blog/best-companies-to-work-for-in-the-u-s-2026-anthropic-netflix-and-google-lead).
sentiment_corroboration.agreement_with_council: MEDIUM - Matches 3/5 toxicity and 4.5 Glassdoor positives, but recent Blind shows rising intensity concerns.

people_corroboration.named_employees_posting: no specific named employees posting about Technical Deployment Lead team in last 90 days; general employee mentions sparse.
people_corroboration.hiring_team_visibility: HIGH - Leadership like CEO Dario Amodei highly visible on X with frequent AI/hiring posts.
